failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id, 
    p.username, 
    p.num_followers, 
    p.num_medias 
FROM 
    profile p 
WHERE 
    p.is_brand = TRUE 
    AND (p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | food | dining'))
ORDER BY 
    p.num_followers DESC 
LIMIT 10;
